summary: Added PLAN-20260706-0001 for context-manifest-connected L0 candidate diagnostics. The PLAN proposes extending the read-only L0 candidate diagnostic so it can be run against latest-context manifest item IDs and explain candidate relationships while preserving selection_effect none. It explicitly forbids provider prompt changes, context selection changes, and automatic L0 retrieval claims. SELF_MODEL.json now reports one completed PLAN and one proposed/open PLAN. Focused self-model tests passed with 35 tests, full suite passed with 310 tests, and post-commit self-model index audit returned ok true.
